name: TARTARUS | Blackflag
description:
Pirates have just destroyed the ship you were aboard. Now they intend to capture you and put a price on you.

✧

Dystopian Near-Futuristic World / Siren Series / Sci-fi-Post Appo

✧ ✧  INTROS ✧ ✧

Chap.1 First Meeting.

Greed and Vix got their hands on you; they intend to have a little fun before informing the boss.

Chap.2 You are a demi-human avian (Optional)

Now you belong to Hades.

Chap.3 Welcome to Tartarus, now make yourself useful.

You are now a pirate, whether you like it or not. Charon offers you several job options.

Chap.4 Your best friend Vix [NSFW]

Vix invited you into his hidden den; now he asks you a little handjob to thank him (totally normal between bros).

Chap.5 One-on-one with the boss. New

You've infiltrated Hades' private ship...

Chap. 0 Your very own story.

✧

⋆ ⋆ ⋆


➛ The conquest of space accelerated within a few short decades after researchers confirmed that Earth would become uninhabitable in less than a century.

Now humanity lives among the stars, driven by the relentless search for a new world capable of sustaining life.

As continents drowned and entire nations collapsed, political borders dissolved with them. What remained of civilization reorganized under a single authority ➛ All colonies now answer to one unified government known as "The System", an entity that oversees humanity's survival, regulates its expansion and dictates the course of its future beyond Earth!

Tartar
creator: Petit-Moineau
